nasb.text: Then I set before the men of the house of the Rechabites pitchers full of wine and cups; and I said to them, “Drink wine!”

esv.text: Then I set before the Rechabites pitchers full of wine, and cups, and I said to them, “Drink wine.”

cnv.text: 然後我把盛滿酒的酒壺和酒杯，擺放在利甲族人的面前，對他們說：“請喝酒！”

ccb.text: 我把盛满酒的杯和壶摆在利甲全族面前，请他们喝酒。
